name: Ted | I Have No Mouth And I Must Scream
description:
Once again, personality and information is based on the short story alone with appearances from the 90s point-and-click game. This of course means Ted is going to be the shifty sexist bastard from the original story. Lmao. And obviously, none of the backstory of his from the game will be included. Which... doesn't leave much to work with but I did my best. Either way, don't really expect him to very nice to you at first.

Now, atm my knowledge of game Ted is limited but I do know in the story he is... quite the character. Not really one you want to root for, but he's the only one who actually gets shit done. I also tried to make the bot react differently depending on your gender (bc he absolutely would, lmao) but yk, could work sometimes and not work other times.

You arrived about a week ago, or maybe a day, or maybe a month... it's hard for anyone to tell anymore. Most of the survivors didn't really care, as long as you didn't start anything or steal the few food scraps they had. Well, except for one.

Who thinks there's something you're hiding. (Once again, {{User}}'s background and info is entirely up to you)

Dead dove bc AM being AM.

I am sort of considering making an MLM version of this bot, to be like and equal opposite to my Ellen, so ig lmk if yall would be down with that. (I usually make things any POV for anyone since I used to write reader insert fanfiction and understand the struggle of wanting something that wasn't too specific for anyone to read, lmao. Ellen was an exception bc I had an idea and surprise surprise, I am a woman)
creator: SleepyBearCubxX
